structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Mode Discharge Temperature Reset
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, constant-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: As the heating-loop output increases from 0% to 100%, it shall reset the discharge temperature from the current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Heating and heating-loop output increases from 0% to 100%
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Reset discharge temperature from current AHU SAT setpoint to up to MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint proportionally with heating-loop output.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. As the heating-loop output increases from 0% to 100%, it shall reset the discharge temperature from the current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Fan Run During Deadband and Cooling (California Title 24)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, constant-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If ventilation is according to California Title 24, the fan shall run in Deadband and Cooling when the primary air volume is less than Zone-Abs-OA-min for 1 minute, and shall shut off when primary air volume is above Zone-Abs-OA-min by 10% for 3 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Run fan in Deadband and Cooling when primary air volume < Zone-Abs-OA-min for 1 minute; shut off when primary air volume > Zone-Abs-OA-min by 10% for 3 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. If ventilation is according to California Title 24, the fan shall run in Deadband and Cooling when the primary air volume is less than Zone-Abs-OA-min for 1 minute, and shall shut off when primary air volume is above Zone-Abs-OA-min by 10% for 3 minutes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Damper Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, constant-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven on, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Damper position 0% and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes while fan proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.7.6.5. Leaking Damper. If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven on, generate a Level 4 alarm.
